heading: Establishment of program
label: 20902 Establishment of program
text: This chapter establishes the Jacob Wetterling, Megan Nicole Kanka, and Pam Lychner Sex Offender Registration and Notification Program.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Adam Walsh Child Protection and Safety Act of 2006. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 2006 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 109–248120 Stat. 587section 10101 of this titleJuly 27, 2006
